title: LLM Wiki
author: Andrej Karpathy
description: A pattern for building personal knowledge bases using LLMs. Instead of RAG (re-deriving answers each query), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki of interlinked markdown files.
og_description: llm-wiki. GitHub Gist: instantly share code, notes, and snippets.

compliance.reason: Wildcard robots.txt restricts gist paths; no explicit Anthropic/Claude blocks. User-initiated single page analysis.
